title: scutellaria oblonga
intro: Scutellaria oblonga, also known as Chinese skullcap, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria oblonga include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria oblonga can be found in teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
